---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for mcp-pm
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### CLI Example

If applicable, show how the new feature would work from the command line:

```bash
mcp <new-command> [options]
```

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the real-world scenario where this feature would be useful. This helps us prioritize.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Would you be willing to contribute?

Let us know if you'd be interested in implementing this feature yourself.

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea
